description_long: This is a modern, cubic house with a flat roof, characterized by clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The exterior is predominantly white with black accents, featuring large rectangular windows and a mix of open and covered outdoor spaces. The property is landscaped with tall, slender trees and a well-maintained lawn, and includes a backyard area with a patio, outdoor seating, and a tennis or basketball court. The house has multiple balconies and terraces, some with slatted sunshades, and a prominent main entryway with steps and a covered porch. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, contributing to the contemporary look. The overall design emphasizes openness, outdoor living, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white house with black accents, large windows, and landscaped grounds featuring trees and a backyard court. The design is minimalist with open terraces, balconies, and a covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, black sunshade, and landscaped lawn with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long white facade, asymmetrical windows, and the backyard court area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the outdoor patio, seating area, and the court, with trees lining the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing balconies, terraces, and additional windows, with more visible landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, black sunshade, steps, and minimalist detailing
